final_prompt.prompt:
Create a single large educational knowledge card for children explaining the Battle of Red Cliffs (赤壁之战) from the Three Kingdoms period.

Style/medium: needs a children's cartoon illustration aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be a single large knowledge card layout with clear title area and bullet points alongside the story illustration
Subject: must include the Battle of Red Cliffs (赤壁之战) story depicted in cartoon illustration form
Scene/backdrop: needs a Three Kingdoms period setting — exact environmental details are yours
Lighting/mood: needs a child-friendly, engaging atmosphere — exact tone balance is yours
Color palette: needs a vibrant, appealing direction for children — exact color choices are yours
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): must include a clear title (title text is yours), bullet points with punctuation listing key story points
Constraints: must preserve all key story elements of the Battle of Red Cliffs, must be suitable for children, single card format
Avoid:
